judgeReasoning: Script satisfies every REQUIRED rubric point: imports product/nav from docs.config.ts, calls convertAllMdx (leadtype/convert) first to populate public/docs/*.md, then calls generateLlmsTxt + generateLLMFullContextFiles (leadtype/llm) and generateDocsSearchFiles (leadtype/search/node) with the config objects, and never shells out to the CLI.
